productName: hashbreak - Pre Rolls (Infused) - Sweet Potato Pie - 1g
description: A hybrid pre-roll of Sweet Potato Chips supercharged with concentrate — packed with flower and boosted inside, outside, or both for a stronger, slower-burning smoke. Boosted for extra strength and more intense effects — a balanced, sweet-earthy profile, with a versatile, anytime balance. A little goes a long way.
